reason: The loop invariants are not inductive w.r.t. the loop body updates i:=i+2 and j:=j-1. Preservation generates contradictory goals (e.g., assuming 7 <= j must imply 6 <= j, then proving false), indicating the invariant was rewritten incorrectly/too strong and does not match the actual state relations maintained by the loop.
